name: Jira Service Management
description: Integrates with Atlassian Jira Service Management REST API for IT service desk operations including request creation, tracking, and resolution

actions.name: Create Issue
actions.description: Create a new issue or service request in Jira Service Management

parameters.name: project_key
parameters.description: Project key where the issue will be created (e.g. ITSM)

parameters.name: summary
parameters.description: Summary/title of the issue

parameters.name: issuetype
parameters.description: Issue type name (e.g. Bug, Task, Story, Service Request)

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Detailed description of the issue in Atlassian Document Format (ADF) or plain text

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: Priority name (e.g. Highest, High, Medium, Low, Lowest)

parameters.name: assignee_account_id
parameters.description: Account ID of the assignee

parameters.name: labels
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of labels

actions.name: Get Issue
actions.description: Retrieve details of a specific issue by issue key or ID

parameters.name: issue_id_or_key
parameters.description: Issue key (e.g. PROJ-123) or numeric ID

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of field names to return

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to expand (e.g. changelog, renderedFields)

actions.name: Update Issue
actions.description: Update fields on an existing issue

parameters.name: issue_id_or_key
parameters.description: Issue key (e.g. PROJ-123) or numeric ID

parameters.name: summary
parameters.description: Updated summary/title

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Updated description

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: Updated priority name

parameters.name: assignee_account_id
parameters.description: Account ID of new assignee

actions.name: List Issues
actions.description: Search for issues using JQL (Jira Query Language)

parameters.name: jql
parameters.description: JQL query string (e.g. project=ITSM AND status='Open')

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: startAt
parameters.description: Starting index for pagination

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of field names to include

actions.name: Add Comment
actions.description: Add a comment to an existing issue

parameters.name: issue_id_or_key
parameters.description: Issue key (e.g. PROJ-123) or numeric ID

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Comment body text in Atlassian Document Format or plain text

parameters.name: visibility_type
parameters.description: Visibility type for the comment (role or group)

parameters.name: visibility_value
parameters.description: Name of the role or group for visibility restriction

actions.name: Transition Issue
actions.description: Transition an issue to a new status (e.g. close, resolve, reopen)

parameters.name: issue_id_or_key
parameters.description: Issue key (e.g. PROJ-123) or numeric ID

parameters.name: transition_id
parameters.description: ID of the transition to execute

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Comment to add during transition

parameters.name: resolution
parameters.description: Resolution name when closing (e.g. Done, Won't Do)
